    devel/llvm-{cheri,morello}: new snapshots, lit fixes

    Fix the the python module name to use an '_' in place of '-' in the
    port-specific module name.

    PR:             270670, 269931

    Co-Authored-by: Pawel Biernacki <kaktus@freebsd.org>
